summary: P1.8-9 Decision view-model: pure mapping from workflow_recommendations to seller-facing Decision envelopes with impact sorting, catalog guard, and lifecycle helpers.

interfaceChanges.description: Maps WorkflowRecommendation to Decision envelope for Decisions UI (#195).
Returns top N decisions by estimated impact for Home preview (#193).

mappings.criterion: Unit tests: toDecision() maps mock recommendation envelope correctly
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_decisions_view_model.test.ts::maps a workflow_recommendation envelope to a Decision

mappings.criterion: Unit tests: takeTopDecisions(_, 3) returns highest-impact three only
Unit tests: invalid/unknown workflow_id rejected or filtered (catalog guard)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_decisions_view_model.test.ts::filters invalid workflow_id values when mapping recommendation batches
